description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker in a vibrant red color, featuring white rubber toe caps and outsoles. The shoe has white metal eyelets and white laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern, with visible stitching along the seams. On the inner ankle side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white and blue. The outsole is textured for grip, and the midsole is white with a thin black stripe running along its length. The shoe shows some signs of light wear, particularly on the sole and fabric, but remains structurally intact and clean.
description: A red high-top canvas sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and a visible Converse All Star logo patch. The shoe is lightly used and features classic styling with a textured sole.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the red canvas, white laces, and rubber toe cap, with visible stitching and eyelets.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the heel seam, pull tab, and the 'Converse All Star' branding on the heel of the sole.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the circular Converse All Star logo patch and the shoe's overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white laces, toe cap, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle side, white with blue and red details; 'Converse All Star' text on the heel of the sole in black.
